episodes.title: Pam Bondi's silent on Trump's involvement in Epstein files release
episodes.description:
Former Attorney General Pam Bondi refused to answer questions Friday on President Donald Trump's involvement in the release of the Jeffrey Epstein case files as she defended the Trump administration's actions before House lawmakers scrutinizing the process.

episodes.title: Religious leader faces additional sexual assault charges, 4 new accusers emerge in Fresno
episodes.description:
A former Fresno man who moved to northern California to create a new religious organization is now facing sexual assault charges.

FOX26 News learned Monday that some of those accusers are from Fresno.

56-year-old Sansue Bee Vang was already facing multiple sexual assault charges in Butte County.

He is still being held without bail.

Butte County's District Attorney Mike Ramsey said the four new victims from the Fresno-area came forward just a few months ago.
